response: I am a dedicated and organized individual with over 15 years of experience in medical transcription, specializing in various medical specialties. My skills include proficiency in software such as eClinicalWorks, Experity EMR, and MS Office. I am passionate about continuous improvement and am committed to delivering accurate and efficient medical transcriptions. I am an Indian national with an On Visit Visa.
